title: lumenskies
description: Lumenskies is a modpack whose main idea is to give you a cozy game experience. It's just you and a light breeze blowing on your cheeks.
body:
![Modpack Image Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4934a4d8a7e6d2716d11b8b7d6041400f8a231f5.png)

Just another modpack trying to keep the vanilla style of the game while bringing a lot of new things to the world of the game

---



|**Key mods**              |                   |
|--------------------------|------------------:|
| Exposure                 | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure)|
| [Let's Do] Vinery        | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-vinery)|
| [Let's Do] HerbalBrews   | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/lets-do-herbalbrews)|
| Amendments               | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)|
| Beautify                 | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/beautify-refabricated)|
| Farmer's Delight         | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)|
| Cluttered                | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/cluttered)|
| Supplementaries          | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries)|
| Seasons                  | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-seasons)|
| Better Archeology        | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-archeology)|
| Moog's Voyager Structures| [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/moogs-voyager-structures)|
| Towns and Towers         | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)|
| Terralith                | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith)|
| Tectonic                 | [Link](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tectonic)|
| Distant Horizons         | [Link](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons)|


---

**Issues**

<details>
<summary>Distant Horizons</summary>

The Distant Horizons mod can put a lot of strain on your CPU so if you are experiencing performance issues try turning it off. This is done in the Options menu, the mod button will be to the left of the FOV slider

</details>

<details>
<summary>Skin Animation</summary>

Fresh Moves resourcepack requires your skin to be slightly edited in order to work correctly. You can find the tutorial on the resourcepack page - [Click](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/tras-fresh-player)

</details>

---

Based on **Simply Optimized** by **Hyper Soup**, which you can find here - [Click](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop)
